=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/catchToIgnore_preview.ts(6,3): suggestion TS377099: `Effect.ignore` expresses ignored failure more directly than `Effect.catch` returning `Effect.void`. effect(catchToIgnore)


==== /.src/catchToIgnore_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    import { Effect } from "effect"
    
    declare const program: Effect.Effect<void, string, never>
    
    export const recovered = program.pipe(
      Effect.catch(() => Effect.void)
      ~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377099: `Effect.ignore` expresses ignored failure more directly than `Effect.catch` returning `Effect.void`. effect(catchToIgnore)
    )
